discussion.tldr: Quiet, upbeat session in the Discussion area. Zero shipped a new Palladium spot setup to the terminal (HTF demand ~$1,000–1,200, calls it potentially massive), opened a Netflix position off a 2D level after the close, and flagged his silver short is printing (tempted to take profit). A member posted a +31% leveraged TAO long win; others discussed BTC sitting on the weekly 200MA, the pros/cons of prop firms, and the new dojo-trading terminal's journaling/multi-wallet features — plus Zero's new side-channel for terminal notifications.

topics.topic: Zero ships a Palladium spot setup
topics.summary: Zero published a new Palladium (XPD) spot setup to the terminal — HTF demand ~$1,000–1,200, which he calls a potentially massive one. Sparked by @Oakensoul flagging palladium/platinum.

topics.topic: Zero opens Netflix off a 2D level
topics.summary: Zero opened a Netflix position from a 2D level after the closure, 'giving it a try'.
Zero's XAG (silver) short is printing well; he's tempted to close the majority. (Short — non-spot.)
@GuybrushThreepwoodSan shared a +31.1% TAO/USDT 20x long on Bitunix; Zero congratulated and reminded him to journal it. Leveraged — non-spot.
@Dheerane said he entered MOS and XPeng, following Zero's existing spot setups.
@FruitCake16 noted BTC is sitting on its weekly 200-period moving average.
@Dheerane asked Zero to reconcile the 'repeated touches weaken a level' idea against a chart (Transrail Lighting, NSE) that keeps holding its support line.
@Jejinhoo gave a candid take on prop firms: plenty are scammy, diversify and mind the rules, but profitable traders can scale funded capital over time.
Members asked about multi-wallet journaling and confluence stats in the new dojo-trading terminal; Zero created a dedicated side channel for terminal notifications.

payload.entry: $1,000–1,200 (optimal ~$1,000: M FVG + 11M BB + M VAH + psychological level)
payload.sharia_note: Palladium is not ribawi (only gold/silver are), so spot/physically-backed ownership is permissible. Express it via a physically-backed palladium ETC (UK: PHPD WisdomTree Physical Palladium; US: PALL abrdn Physical Palladium) — NOT a leveraged XPD/USD CFD.
payload.note: spot · HTF discount demand after an MMXM model completion + a -45/50% drop. PLANNED — price is still approaching the zone; awaiting the discount tap + HTF confirmation. R:R ~2.6:1 to TP1, ~4:1 to TP2. Strategies: supply/demand + breaker.
payload.text: Palladium (XPD) long from HTF M demand $1,000–1,200, optimal ~$1,000 (M FVG + 11M BB + M VAH, psychological level). Exit: secure BE when it moves in favour + take partials. Invalidation: HTF closure below the 11M BB.
